expectations.evidence: Has '## Task Overview' table with columns #, Task, Depends on, Parallel — lists all 7 tasks
All 7 tasks have '### Context' sections with substantial content — e.g., Task 1 explains class-based strategy, preference vs resolved theme design, how it connects to <html>
All 7 tasks have '### Acceptance Criteria' with checkbox items
All 7 tasks have '### Dependencies' with 'Blocked by:' and 'Blocks:' lines
No spec exists for this eval. All context is inline and self-contained
System detection (T2), manual toggle with persistence (T3+T6), component theming (T4+T5), plus infrastructure (T1) and integration testing (T7)
Has Goal, Task Overview table, then numbered '## Task N: Name' sections with consistent subsection structure
